properties.name: twelvedata.api.key
properties.description: API key used to authenticate requests to the Twelve Data market data service.

properties.name: twelvedata.price.url
properties.description: URL for the Twelve Data current price endpoint.

properties.name: twelvedata.time-series.url
properties.description: URL for the Twelve Data historical time-series endpoint.

properties.name: pricing.cache.fresh-seconds
properties.description: Number of seconds a freshly retrieved market price remains in the primary cache.

properties.name: pricing.cache.stale-hours
properties.description: Number of hours a last-known-good market price remains available for stale fallback use.

properties.name: pricing.cache.failure-minutes
properties.description: Number of minutes provider-side quote failures are cached to avoid repeated calls for blocked or unsupported symbols.

properties.name: pricing.cache.history-failure-minutes
properties.description: Number of minutes historical provider failures are cached to avoid repeated time-series calls for unsupported symbols.
